rationale: The cited paper develops a customer-based valuation model linking customer metrics (especially retention) to firm value, while the citing paper’s core contribution is linking customer behaviors to future cash flow level/volatility and shareholder value. The citing note explicitly positions the study as extending prior customer equity/CRM work, which makes this 2004 “Valuing Customers” paper a plausible foundational/theory source rather than an incidental mention. With this conceptual overlap and direct DOI match, this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
